notes: Built from the known-working WarehouseDataCollector 0.2.21 portable template.
Trace exports and TraceCollector merge still produce Excel files.
Update Trace Master From Latest Merge now writes Trace_Master.parquet as the Trace master.
Trace_Master.xlsx is left untouched and only used as an optional seed when Parquet does not exist.
Dataset Center reads Trace_Master.parquet metadata safely without full-reading the file on startup.
